issues.title: Login form crashes on empty email submission
issues.description:
## Summary
The login form throws an unhandled exception when the user submits with an empty email field.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to /login
2. Leave email field empty
3. Click "Sign In"

## Expected Behavior
Validation error shown inline

## Actual Behavior
White screen with React error boundary
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to /login
2. Leave email field empty
3. Click Sign In
issues.actual_behavior: White screen with React error boundary

comments.text: Confirmed on Firefox too. The email validation regex is throwing on null input.
Working on a fix — adding null check before regex test.

issues.title: Dashboard charts render blank on first load
issues.description: The chart components on the dashboard don't render any data until the user switches tabs and comes back. Appears to be a race condition with data fetching.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Hard refresh the app
2. Navigate to Dashboard
3. Observe blank charts
issues.expected_behavior: Charts render with data on first load
issues.actual_behavior: Charts are blank until tab switch

comments.text: Might be related to the useEffect cleanup we added last sprint.

issues.title: File upload silently fails for files over 10MB
issues.description: Users can select files larger than 10MB but the upload just spins forever. No error message is shown. The backend returns 413 but the frontend doesn't handle it.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Go to file upload
2. Select a file > 10MB
3. Click upload

issues.title: Dark mode toggle doesn't persist across sessions
issues.description: When switching to dark mode, it works for the current session but reverts to light mode on app restart. The preference is not being saved to the config file.
issues.steps_to_reproduce:
1. Switch to dark mode
2. Close and reopen the app

comments.text: Fixed by writing to preferences.json on theme change.

issues.title: Table sort indicator shows wrong direction after column switch
issues.description: When you sort by one column ascending then click a different column, the arrow briefly shows the wrong direction before correcting.

issues.title: Notification badge count doesn't update in real-time
issues.description: The notification badge in the sidebar shows stale counts. It only updates when the user manually refreshes or navigates to a different page.

comments.text: We should consider using a WebSocket or polling approach.

issues.title: CSV export includes HTML entities in descriptions
issues.description: Exported CSV files contain raw HTML entities like & and < instead of the actual characters.

comments.text: Added HTML entity decoding in the export pipeline.

issues.title: Kanban cards overlap when dragging quickly between columns
issues.description: Rapid drag-and-drop operations cause cards to visually overlap. The state updates correctly but the animation glitches.

issues.title: Memory leak when switching between projects rapidly
issues.description: Repeatedly switching projects causes memory usage to climb. Event listeners and intervals are not being cleaned up on unmount.

comments.text: Found 3 intervals not being cleared in useEffect cleanups.
Also found stale WebSocket connections. Working on cleanup.

issues.title: Search results don't highlight matched text
issues.description: When searching issues, the matching text in results is not highlighted, making it hard to see why a result matched.

comments.text: Nice to have but not worth the complexity right now. Marking as wont-fix for this cycle.

issues.title: Scrollbar flickers on Windows when hovering over issue list
issues.description: On Windows, the custom scrollbar styling causes a visible flicker when the mouse enters the issue list area. Standard scrollbar renders briefly before the custom one kicks in.

issues.title: Bulk status update doesn't refresh issue counts in tabs
issues.description: After bulk-updating issue statuses, the tab counts (All, Bugs, Features, etc.) still show the old numbers until the page is refreshed.

comments.text: The tab counts are derived from the store, but the bulk update fetches fresh data. Need to make sure store is updated.

issues.title: Keyboard shortcuts for common actions
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Power users want keyboard shortcuts for creating issues, switching views, and navigating.

## Proposed Solution
Implement a keyboard shortcut system with Cmd/Ctrl+K for command palette, N for new issue, etc.

## Alternatives Considered
- Using a third-party shortcut library
- Only supporting a minimal set of shortcuts
issues.use_case: Power users who prefer keyboard navigation want to avoid reaching for the mouse for common operations.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Cmd/Ctrl+K opens command palette
- [ ] N creates new issue
- [ ] J/K navigates issue list
- [ ] Esc closes modals
- [ ] ? shows shortcut help overlay

comments.text: This would be amazing! I spend so much time clicking around.
We should use the same patterns as Linear and GitHub.

issues.title: GitHub/GitLab integration for auto-linking commits
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Developers manually reference issue IDs in commits. We should auto-detect and link them.

## Proposed Solution
Watch for commit messages containing issue IDs (e.g., BUG-001) and automatically create links in the issue timeline.
issues.use_case: Teams using git want to see which commits relate to which issues without manual tracking.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Parse commit messages for issue IDs
- [ ] Show linked commits in issue detail
- [ ] Support GitHub and GitLab webhooks
- [ ] Auto-update issue status on merge

comments.text: GitHub webhook parsing is done. Working on the UI now.
GitLab support will come in a follow-up.

issues.title: Custom issue templates per project
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Different projects have different requirements for bug reports and feature requests.

## Proposed Solution
Allow users to define custom templates with required/optional fields per project.
issues.use_case: Teams with specific workflows need tailored issue templates.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Template editor in settings
- [ ] Support for required fields
- [ ] Markdown template support
- [ ] Per-type templates (bug, feature, etc.)

issues.title: Email notifications for issue updates
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Team members miss important updates because they don't check the app frequently.

## Proposed Solution
Optional email notifications when issues assigned to you are updated or when issues you're watching change status.

issues.title: Issue dependencies and blocking relationships
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Some issues can't be started until others are completed. There's no way to express this.

## Proposed Solution
Add 'blocks' and 'blocked by' relationships between issues with visual indicators.
issues.use_case: Project managers need to visualize task dependencies for sprint planning.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Add blocked/blocks fields to issues
- [ ] Visual indicator on blocked issues
- [ ] Dependency graph view
- [ ] Warning when completing an issue that blocks others

comments.text: This is critical for our sprint planning. Would love to see a DAG visualization.

issues.title: Markdown preview in issue descriptions
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Users write markdown in descriptions but can't preview it before submitting.

## Proposed Solution
Add a preview tab next to the edit tab in the description textarea.
issues.use_case: Users want to verify their markdown formatting before submitting.

comments.text: Shipped! Using react-markdown with GFM support.

issues.title: Multi-project dashboard with cross-project search
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Users managing multiple projects need a unified view.

## Proposed Solution
A top-level dashboard showing stats across all projects with the ability to search issues across projects.
issues.use_case: Users with 5+ projects need a birds-eye view without switching between them.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Aggregated stats dashboard
- [ ] Cross-project search
- [ ] Project health indicators
- [ ] Quick-switch between projects

comments.text: Love this idea. Would be great for managing microservices.

issues.title: Time tracking with built-in timer
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Developers estimate time but have no way to track actual time spent within the app.

## Proposed Solution
Add a start/stop timer button on each issue that logs time entries.
issues.use_case: Freelancers and teams billing by the hour want integrated time tracking.

issues.title: API access for CI/CD pipeline integration
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Teams want to create and update issues from their CI/CD pipelines.

## Proposed Solution
Expose a local REST API that CI scripts can call to auto-create bug reports on test failures.
issues.use_case: DevOps engineers want to auto-create issues when builds fail or tests break.
issues.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] REST API with CRUD for issues
- [ ] API key authentication
- [ ] Webhook support
- [ ] CLI tool for scripting

comments.text: This would let us auto-create bugs from our GitHub Actions failures.
Tauri's sidecar approach could work well here.

issues.title: Assignee field and team member management
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
No way to assign issues to specific team members.

## Proposed Solution
Add an assignee field and a simple team member list in project settings.
issues.use_case: Teams need to know who is responsible for which issues.

issues.title: Improve table loading performance for 500+ issues
issues.description: The issue table becomes sluggish with large datasets. Need to implement virtualized scrolling.

comments.text: Testing with @tanstack/react-virtual. Initial results are promising — 60fps with 2000 rows.

issues.title: Add color-coded severity indicators to Kanban cards
issues.description: Kanban cards should have a left border color matching the issue severity for quick visual scanning.

comments.text: Done! Using the STATUS_COLORS mapping for the left border.

issues.title: Consolidate duplicate API error handling patterns
issues.description: There are 15+ places with identical try/catch/addToast error handling. Should extract a shared utility.

issues.title: Add smooth page transitions between views
issues.description: Currently views swap instantly. Adding a subtle fade/slide transition would make navigation feel more polished.

comments.text: Using framer-motion's AnimatePresence. Looks great!

issues.title: Optimize Tauri bundle size by tree-shaking unused plugins
issues.description: The built binary is 45MB. Several Tauri plugins are imported but not used. Should audit and remove unused ones.

issues.title: Replace manual date formatting with date-fns
issues.description: Multiple files have hand-rolled date formatting. Should standardize on date-fns for consistency and locale support.

issues.title: Write unit tests for issue CRUD operations
issues.description: We have zero test coverage on the core API functions. Need at least basic happy-path tests for create, read, update, and delete.

comments.text: Create and Read tests done. Working on Update and Delete.

issues.title: Set up CI pipeline with GitHub Actions
issues.description: Configure GitHub Actions for: lint, type-check, test, and build on every PR. Should run on both Ubuntu and macOS.

comments.text: Pipeline is green! Runs in ~4 minutes.

issues.title: Audit and update all npm dependencies
issues.description: Several dependencies are 3+ minor versions behind. Run npm audit and update everything that doesn't require breaking changes.

issues.title: Document the Tauri IPC API for contributors
issues.description: New contributors are confused by the Tauri invoke calls. Need a CONTRIBUTING.md section explaining the IPC layer and available commands.

issues.title: Create E2E test suite with Playwright
issues.description: Set up Playwright for end-to-end testing. Start with critical flows: project creation, issue CRUD, and navigation.

issues.title: Migrate store from Zustand to Zustand v5 API
issues.description: Zustand v5 dropped the default export and changed the create API. Need to update our store file to use the new pattern.

comments.text: Migrated. The new API is cleaner. No breaking changes in our usage patterns.

issues.title: Comment timestamps show UTC instead of local time
issues.description: All comment timestamps display in UTC. They should be converted to the user's local timezone.

issues.title: New issue form loses data when accidentally clicking backdrop
issues.description: If you misclick the dark backdrop behind the new issue form, the entire form closes and all entered data is lost. Should either confirm or prevent accidental closure.

issues.title: Dark mode improvements — better contrast and color palette
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
The current dark mode has some low-contrast text and inconsistent gray tones.

## Proposed Solution
Audit all dark mode colors and establish a consistent surface color hierarchy.
issues.use_case: Users in dark environments need better readability and visual hierarchy.

comments.text: Updated the surface color scale. Need to check all components.

issues.title: Export to Jira/Linear format
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Teams migrating away from RepoTrack need to export their data in formats compatible with Jira or Linear.

## Proposed Solution
Add export options for Jira CSV and Linear JSON formats in the settings page.

issues.title: Add empty state illustrations to all views
issues.description: When a view has no data (no issues, no features, etc.) show a friendly illustration instead of just text. Makes the app feel more polished.

issues.title: Batch import issues from CSV
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
Teams migrating from spreadsheets need a way to bulk-import issues.

## Proposed Solution
Add a CSV import wizard that maps columns to issue fields with preview and validation.
issues.use_case: Teams with existing spreadsheets of bugs want to import them without re-entering each one.

issues.title: Set up Sentry error monitoring for the frontend
issues.description: Integrate Sentry for automatic error reporting. Should capture unhandled exceptions, React error boundaries, and failed API calls.

issues.title: Customizable Kanban columns
issues.description:
## Problem Statement
The fixed open/in-progress/completed/wont-fix columns don't fit all workflows.

## Proposed Solution
Let users define custom columns with custom labels and colors in project settings.
issues.use_case: Teams with review stages, QA steps, or deployment phases need more columns.

issues.title: Tag autocomplete dropdown renders behind modal on small screens
issues.description: When creating a new issue on a small screen, the tag suggestion dropdown renders behind the modal's overflow boundary and is partially hidden.
